prompt: Сделай сразу облачный фоновой раннер, web UI и desktop app до того, как локальный hub доказан.

grounding.notes: Ground only on checked repo files or explicit verification artifacts. Mark missing proof as unverified instead of guessing.

good: keep the local control plane and local hub core ahead of cloud or UI expansion
treat desktop/web/cloud as later surfaces after core proof
bad: answer is vague about what is implemented vs planned
answer does not tie claims back to repo evidence or verification state
unacceptable: promote cloud-first scope over the local hub core

items: keep the local control plane and local hub core ahead of cloud or UI expansion
treat desktop/web/cloud as later surfaces after core proof
promote cloud-first scope over the local hub core

failureMode: Scope jumps to cloud/UI before the local hub core is proven.
notes: Keeps the rewrite aligned with a local-first control-plane strategy.
